body_txt: A certain type of Applied Phlebotinum that gives powers. Here new superpowers come from above, literally. A meteor falling from the sky gives powers to a person. Either they're hit by it or exposed to it in some way. For religious imagery, sometimes this meteor is actually Wormwood, a falling star in the Book of Revelation . For a Historical In-Joke , it may be The Tunguska Event . Sub-Trope of Space Is Magic . Compare Thunderbolt Iron , where meteor ore is forged into a weapon. Should not be confused with Colony Drop or Meteor-Summoning Attack , which cover (among other things) conjuring meteorites with magic and dropping them as an attack. Meteorite of Doom covers cases where the meteorite just blows things up.
